response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and deep expertise in backend architecture, testing, and AI-agent infrastructure — plus proven success in end-to-end ownership and open-source contributions. His work with AWS, Kubernetes, and multi-language environments (including Java/Kotlin via DLang and C#) exceeds requirements, and his communication skills are demonstrated through extensive workshops and public talks.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker across enterprise and open-source projects
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, directly matching a key requirement
Strong advocacy for testing, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship with public workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent frameworks (Express, custom runners) are used
No direct experience with Kotlin/Java listed — though DLang and C# suggest transferable backend skills
German language skill is only basic, which may impact collaboration in Berlin-based teams
